name: Majester Paladin, the Ascending Dracoslayer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>昇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マジェスター<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｐ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>パラディン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Majester Paladin, the Ascending Dragon Swordsman
desc:
2 Level 4 Pendulum Monsters
When this card is Xyz Summoned: You can add 1 Pendulum Monster from your Deck to your hand during the End Phase of this turn. Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card; Special Summon 1 face-up "Dracoslayer" Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck, but it cannot be used as material for an Xyz Summon.
